respStmt.resp: headword, grammar, and citations as printed
respStmt.name: CDSL source dictionary

listBibl.head: Derived from CDSL source records for the TEI Lex-0 baseline pilot.

projectDesc.p: tei-lex0-pilot-v0.1; DARIAH TEI Lex-0 baseline element model. Per-statement epistemic status is carried in @cert/@resp (docs/EVIDENCE_LABEL_CROSSWALK.md).

sense.def: śubhādṛṣṭam — paryāya: puṇyam, śreyaḥ, sukṛtam, vṛṣaḥ

cit.quote: eka eva suhṛddharmmo nidhane'pyanuyāti yaḥ . śarīreṇa samaṃ nāśaṃ sarvvamanyattu gacchati ..

sense.note: In the source this synonym run and its authority (iti Amara) are one indivisible iti-unit: sense enumeration and source attestation are a single construction, split into def + bibl here.

sense.def: nyāyaḥ; svabhāvaḥ; ācāraḥ; upamā; kratuḥ; ahiṃsā; upaniṣat

cit.quote: kṛtvā pravargyaṃ dharmmākhyaṃ yathāvat dvijasattamāḥ . cakruste vidhivadrājaṃstathaivābhiṣavaṃ dbijāḥ ..

sense.note: Sense and its closing authority (iti Medinī) are one indivisible iti-unit in the source, split into def + bibl in the Lex-0 baseline.

cit.quote: prāṇāyāmastathā dhyānaṃ pratyāhāro'tha dhāraṇā . smaraṇañcaiva yoge'smin pañca dharmmāḥ prakīrttitāḥ ..

sense.note: Sense and its closing authority (iti Hemacandra) are one indivisible iti-unit in the source, split into def + bibl in the Lex-0 baseline.

entry.note: Source-parsed indigenous kosa entry: meanings/synonyms are grouped by their closing authority (iti <author>), the kosa's own sense-and-citation unit.
